approved_results.text: The hosted run recovered 8 processed GEO sample tables and the GPL annotation, yielding a 27112-gene by 8-sample matrix for quantitative analysis.

The strongest named 24-hour cosine fits were CH25H (R² 0.965, amplitude 1.300, phase 20.8 h), PLN (R² 0.949, amplitude 0.952, phase 17.4 h), ARL6IP2 (R² 0.948, amplitude 0.533, phase 5.8 h), FOXN4 (R² 0.943, amplitude 0.524, phase 5.9 h), LILRA2 (R² 0.940, amplitude 0.272, phase 2.9 h).
ARNTL/BMAL1 reached amplitude 0.790 log2 units with R² 0.742 and phase 20.1 h; CRY2 reached amplitude 1.631 with R² 0.518; PER1 reached amplitude 0.590 with R² 0.363.
The strongest sample-level correlation was GSM1982275 versus GSM1982279 at r=0.866, and the earliest-vs-latest comparison remained positively correlated at r=0.739.

reference_catalog.text: GEO series landing page for GSE76369. GSE76369. https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/download/?acc=GSE76369&format=file&file=GSE76369_series_matrix.txt.gz. https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE76369. Primary GEO accession source; staged retrieval began with series matrix and then recovered processed sample tables.
GEO platform annotation for GPL21250. GPL21250. https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GPL21250. Platform annotation used to map probe IDs onto gene symbols and names.
